title: SVG2OOXML W3C Corpus Metadata
description: W3C SVG Test Suite corpus for svg2ooxml testing

decks.description: This tests the return value required for the SVGAnimationElement.getStartTime() method, as described in section 19.5 DOM Interfaces.
